name: telemetry-ingest
description: ingests real-time sensor data from grid substations

name: grid-monitor
description: real-time monitoring and alerting for grid health

name: dispatch-optimizer
description: optimizes power dispatch across generation assets

name: customer-portal
description: customer-facing web application for accounts and usage

name: outage-notifier
description: sends outage notifications via email, SMS and push

name: payment-gateway
description: processes card and bank payments with external PSPs

name: billing-engine
description: computes invoices from usage data and tariff plans

name: tariff-service
description: manages tariff plans and pricing rules

name: data-lake-sync
description: syncs operational data into the analytics lake

name: forecast-service
description: predicts energy demand using ML models

name: meter-reader
description: collects readings from smart meters in the field

name: auth-service
description: authentication and token issuance for all platforms

name: api-gateway
description: edge routing, rate limiting and TLS termination
